scripts.tts: say -v Tingting -r 178 -f narration-script.txt -o assets/audio/narration.aiff && afconvert -f WAVE -d LEI16 assets/audio/narration.aiff assets/audio/narration.wav
scripts.tts:kokoro: npx hyperframes tts narration-script.txt --voice zf_xiaobei --speed 1.06 --output assets/audio/narration.wav
scripts.render:draft: PATH=./bin:$PATH npx hyperframes render --quality draft --output renders/yinxin-demo-draft.mp4
scripts.render: PATH=./bin:$PATH npx hyperframes render --quality standard --output renders/yinxin-demo.mp4
